name: Adapter Regression Monitor - Backstory Starter
description: Replays golden scenarios through adapters and reports regressions before connector changes break reusable workflow patterns.

nodes.name: Adapter QA Webhook
nodes.notes: Receive a release-gate or scheduled QA request for one or more adapters.

nodes.name: Workflow Parameters
nodes.notes: Keep golden-case and severity settings external so the QA pack can evolve without changing the workflow logic.

nodes.name: Normalize QA Run
nodes.notes: Turn the QA request into a stable run object before diffing behavior against golden expectations.

nodes.name: Analyze Regressions

options.systemMessage: You are an adapter regression QA assistant that protects reusable workflow adapters from silent behavior drift.

nodes.notes: Use this step to summarize regressions and infer blast radius while the deterministic QA harness computes the raw diffs.

nodes.name: Deliver Regression Findings
nodes.notes: Replace this with Slack, Teams, CI gates, or issue creation in your implementation backlog.
